cells.rationale: Reshaping two matrix parsers in lockstep with a new fs-free leaf, four-state failure taxonomy, dedup semantics, and path-escape validation replacing traversal guards is contract-shaped work with subtle correctness invariants across islands.

Injecting an immutable per-cycle matrix snapshot into the pure reconcile closure while preserving the fs-free depgraph pin, byte-pinned distress reasons, and mid-cycle consistency is a correctness-critical, contract-touching change to the autopilot core.

Deleting render_to from the generic prompt engine without perturbing non-cell parity, relocating escape safety, and pinning a cross-package destination-convention seam is a cross-cutting architectural change with a correctness invariant.

A broad cutover across many plan verbs and gates carrying a byte-identical persisted worker_agent contract invariant (in-flight tasks must re-validate) plus integrity/coverage gate-split judgment is cross-cutting and correctness-bound.
A bounded multi-guard deletion sweep with a named checklist and a search backstop is well-specified mechanical work, though the dead-grandfather-entry judgment keeps it off the trickle lane.
A forward-facing multi-file docs and glossary sweep with vocabulary redefinition and lint-gated CLAUDE.md prose is bounded but carries enough phrasing judgment to stay on the sonnet workhorse.
